name: Green Leaf Money, Inc.
description_short: LendZee (operating as Green Leaf Money, Inc.) is a business funding platform using AI technology to connect entrepreneurs with SBA loans, equipment financing, and unsecured term loans.
description_long:
LendZee operates as a business lending marketplace that specializes in connecting small business owners and franchisees with various forms of business funding. The company positions itself as a technology-enabled intermediary rather than a direct lender, leveraging AI to improve lending decisions for their partner lenders. Their website emphasizes speed and transparency, highlighting same-day pre-approvals and no upfront fees as key selling points.

The platform offers multiple financing products including SBA loans, unsecured term loans, equipment loans, ROBS (Rollover for Business Startups), working capital financing, and real estate loans. They serve both established businesses seeking growth capital and startups/franchisees launching new ventures. The application process is entirely online with document upload capabilities, and they provide case studies and a marketplace feature for matched lenders.

LendZee differentiates itself through personalized service, particularly highlighting Processing Director Lynnda as a key team member across multiple recent customer reviews. Customer testimonials emphasize step-by-step guidance, responsiveness, and a consultative approach that goes beyond transactional lending. The company markets AI technology not to replace human judgment but to help lenders make better underwriting decisions on behalf of borrowers.

The platform appears legitimate based on consistent branding, detailed service offerings, and numerous specific customer testimonials dated within the past 3 months. However, as a marketplace model, actual loan terms, approval rates, and funding speed depend on underlying lender partners, which are not disclosed on the website. No information about pricing, typical APRs, or loan amounts is publicly available, requiring applicants to complete pre-qualification to understand actual terms.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Claims same-day pre-approvals with no upfront fees
Multiple financing products available (SBA, equipment, unsecured, ROBS, real estate, working capital)
Personalized guidance from processing team throughout entire funding journey
Online application process with document upload capability
Recent customer reviews (within 3 months) consistently praise responsiveness and transparency
Serves both franchisees and startup founders, not just established businesses
AI technology claimed to improve lender decision-making on behalf of applicants
cons: Actual loan terms, APRs, and funding amounts not disclosed publicly—requires pre-approval application to see terms
Marketplace model means approval depends on partner lenders, not LendZee directly; no SLA for actual funding timeline
No information about approval rates, typical loan amounts, or average time-to-funding on website
Heavy reliance on single staff member (Lynnda) mentioned across multiple reviews raises continuity concerns
Limited transparency on partner lender identity and underwriting criteria
best_for: Small business owners and franchisees seeking $5K-$500K+ in growth capital
Startups and new franchises needing structured guidance through the lending application process
Business owners wanting personalized service beyond automated lending platforms
diagnosis: LendZee is best for business owners and franchisees who value personalized guidance and want help navigating multiple financing options, but applicants should understand that actual loan approval, terms, and funding speed depend on partner lenders and are not guaranteed. Request detailed information about partner lenders, typical loan amounts, APRs, and actual funding timelines before committing time to the application.
services: SBA loan matching and application assistance
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
address: 3900 S Hualapai Wy #115, Las Vegas, NV 89147
meta_description: Green Leaf Money provides AI-powered business funding including SBA loans, equipment financing, and term loans for entrepreneurs.
